records.content: GitHub API request failed with 401 because the access token had expired.
Refreshing the GitHub token and retrying fixed the 401 error.
GitHub API rate limit caused a temporary 403 response.
Slack webhook failed because the signing secret was missing.
Use terse bullet points in status updates.
Database connection failed due to an incorrect host value.
Check whether the environment variables are loaded before retrying an API call.
GitHub pull request fetch worked after widening repository permissions.
Retry with exponential backoff for transient upstream failures.
The CI pipeline failed because the package lockfile was out of date.

queries.text: How should I fix this GitHub API 401 failure?
What past context is most useful for a failing authenticated GitHub API call?

feedback_positive.reason: These captured the true cause and the successful fix.

feedback_negative.reason: Rate limiting looked similar but was not the cause of the 401.
